creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Igor Ostapenko from comment #10)
Thanks for the explanations.

I've created monolithic patch for all of them.
But unfortunately, I don't have any of additional ports installed, so cannot test (not to accidentally pull in unneeded-for-me dependencies (because of FETCH_DEPENDS, EXTRACT_DEPENDS,... which I don't use and I've overlooking on tracking).

Once bapt@ agrees with our direction, I can upload it as-is here, or file indivitual PR and upload splitted patch for anyone possible to test.

If I can take enough time, I would try building them on poudriere (stable/14, amd64 only) not to pollute bare-metal environment. But as poudriere often does too excessive builds/rebuilds, I cannot estimate how long it would take for me.

If you want to give the patch a shot, I can upload monolithic patch here, or send you directly via email. Anyway, filing individual PRs now would be too stupid.

Note that some wants apr-sh which `which atf-sh` doesn't find anything, I've left TEST_DEPENDS for devel/atf (actually) unconditionally if specified.
